overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through rural countryside at night. The scene transitions from open grasslands with scattered trees to a more enclosed forested area, passing wooden fences and a dilapidated house.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through open grasslands, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grass
tall grass fields extending to the horizon
rolling hills visible on the horizon under the night sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open grasslands at night. The landscape is wide and exposed with scattered trees visible in the distance and rolling hills on the horizon. The path winds gently through the tall grass with no other characters or structures in sight.

events.description: path curves right entering area with white birch trees on the right side

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the path curves, passing white birch trees on the right

entered.detail: white-barked birch trees lining the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path curves gently as Geralt enters a section with distinctive white birch trees on the right. The landscape becomes slightly more enclosed with denser vegetation, though the sky remains partially visible. The dirt trail continues winding through the mixed forest area.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural trail with wooden fencing and farm structures

events.description: wooden fence with sunflowers appears on the left side of the path
dilapidated wooden house comes into view on the left

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past a wooden fence with sunflowers and approaches a dilapidated house on the left

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence running alongside the path
tall sunflowers growing along the fence line
abandoned wooden house with damaged roof in the distance

segments.scene_description: The trail passes by a wooden fence adorned with sunflowers on the left. A dilapidated abandoned house appears in the distance on the left side as the environment takes on a more rural, semi-cultivated character. The path remains a dirt trail but feels more enclosed by vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail entering dark woods

events.description: passing the dilapidated house and entering darker forested area

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking past the abandoned house into a darker, denser forest area

entered.detail: thick dark forest closing in around the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the dilapidated house and enters a darker, more enclosed forest area. The sky becomes mostly obscured by dense tree canopy, and the surroundings feel more isolated and ominous. The path continues winding deeper into the dark woods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt travels from wide, exposed grasslands into the oppressive depths of a dark forest. It begins on a winding dirt path through open plains under a night sky, with rolling hills and scattered trees visible on the distant horizon. As the path curves, the landscape gradually tightens, transitioning into a mixed woodland characterized by distinctive white birch trees and denser vegetation. The scene then shifts toward a semi-cultivated rural area, passing a wooden fence adorned with sunflowers and a dilapidated abandoned house. Finally, the camera follows Geralt past the ruins and deeper into a heavily wooded region where the dense canopy obscures the sky, leaving the surroundings feeling isolated and ominous.
